ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload map ( payload01 , indexOfPayload01 ) -> { External_Id__c: payload01.externalId, Name: payload01.accountName, Type: payload01.accountType, BillingStreet: payload01.billingStreet, BillingCity: payload01.billingCity, BillingState: payload01.billingState, BillingPostalCode: payload01.billingPostalCode, BillingCountry: payload01.billingCountry, ShippingStreet: payload01.shippingStreet, ShippingCity: payload01.shippingCity, ShippingState: payload01.shippingState, ShippingPostalCode: payload01.shippingPostalCode, ShippingCountry: payload01.shippingCountry, Phone: payload01.phoneNumber, AccountNumber: payload01.accountNumber, Website: payload01.website, Industry: payload01.industry, OwnerId: payload01.ownerId, Active__c: payload01.activeFlag as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 201, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer records processed successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { recordCount: sizeOf(vars.originalRequestPayload), successCount: sizeOf(payload.items), failureCount: 0 } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils
var upsertItems = payload.items default [] var originalRequestPayload = vars.originalRequestPayload default [] var successCount = sizeOf(upsertItems filter ((item) -> item.successful default false)) var failureCount = sizeOf(upsertItems filter ((item) -> !(item.successful default false))) var overallStatus = if (failureCount == 0) "SUCCESS" else if (successCount == 0) "ERROR" else "WARNING" var overallMessage = if (failureCount == 0) "Customer records processed successfully." else if (successCount == 0) "Customer records failed processing." else "Customer records processed with partial success." --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 201, status: overallStatus, message: overallMessage, correlationId: correlationId default "", data: { recordCount: sizeOf(originalRequestPayload), successCount: successCount, failureCount: failureCount, results: upsertItems map (item, indexOfItem) -> { externalId: originalRequestPayload[indexOfItem].externalId default null, status: if (item.successful default false) "SUCCESS" else "FAILED", (code: "CUSTOMER.UPSERT.VALIDATION-FAILED") if !(item.successful default false), (salesforceAccountId: item.id) if (item.successful default false), message: if (item.successful default false) "Customer processed successfully." else item.message default "Customer processing failed." } } }

salesforce:query.doc:name: Account by ID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT FIELDS(ALL) FROM Account WHERE Id = ':id' LIMIT 1

raise-error.description: The provided salesforceAccountId is not a valid Salesforce ID
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the Salesforce account.
No Salesforce account exists for the provided salesforceAccountId.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer record retrieved successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { customer: { salesforceAccountId: payload[0].Id default "", externalId: payload[0].External_Id__c default "", accountName: payload[0].Name default "", accountNumber: payload[0].AccountNumber default "", website: payload[0].Website default "", phoneNumber: payload[0].Phone default "", billingStreet: payload[0].BillingStreet default "", billingCity: payload[0].BillingCity default "", billingState: payload[0].BillingState default "", billingPostalCode: payload[0].BillingPostalCode default "", billingCountry: payload[0].BillingCountry default "", shippingStreet: payload[0].ShippingStreet default "", shippingCity: payload[0].ShippingCity default "", shippingState: payload[0].ShippingState default "", shippingPostalCode: payload[0].ShippingPostalCode default "", shippingCountry: payload[0].ShippingCountry default "", industry: payload[0].Industry default "", accountType: payload[0].Type default "", ownerId: payload[0].OwnerId default "", activeFlag: payload[0].Active__c as Boolean default true, createdDate: payload[0].CreatedDate as String default "", lastModifiedDate: payload[0].LastModifiedDate as String default "" } } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer records retrieved successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { customers: payload map ( payload01 , indexOfPayload01 ) -> { salesforceAccountId: payload01.Id default "", externalId: payload01.External_Id__c default "", accountName: payload01.Name default "", accountNumber: payload01.AccountNumber default "", website: payload01.Website default "", phoneNumber: payload01.Phone default "", billingStreet: payload01.BillingStreet default "", billingCity: payload01.BillingCity default "", billingState: payload01.BillingState default "", billingPostalCode: payload01.BillingPostalCode default "", billingCountry: payload01.BillingCountry default "", shippingStreet: payload01.ShippingStreet default "", shippingCity: payload01.ShippingCity default "", shippingState: payload01.ShippingState default "", shippingPostalCode: payload01.ShippingPostalCode default "", shippingCountry: payload01.ShippingCountry default "", industry: payload01.Industry default "", accountType: payload01.Type default "", ownerId: payload01.OwnerId default "", activeFlag: payload01.Active__c as Boolean default true, createdDate: payload01.CreatedDate as String default "", lastModifiedDate: payload01.LastModifiedDate as String default "" }, recordCount: sizeOf(payload) } }
